hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys, re
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
f = data.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
if not f: sys.exit(0)

# .agents/ rule mirror files edited -> remind to mirror to .cursor/rules/
if m := re.search(r'/.agents/(context|coding-style|python-typing)\.md$', f):
    mirrors = {
        'context': '.cursor/rules/tcfuse-core.mdc',
        'coding-style': '.cursor/rules/tcfuse-coding-style.mdc',
        'python-typing': '.cursor/rules/python-pyright.mdc',
    }
    mirror = mirrors[m.group(1)]
    msg = (f'Agent context edited: {f} '
           f'— mirror the change to {mirror} (Cursor mirror).')
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PostToolUse', 'additionalContext': msg}}))

# Any other .agents/ file edited -> remind to sync both Claude and Cursor pointers
elif re.search(r'/.agents/', f):
    msg = (f'Agent skill file edited: {f} '
           '— if this is a new/renamed/removed skill, update BOTH '
           '.claude/commands/<topic>.md (Claude pointer) and '
           '.cursor/skills/<topic>/SKILL.md (Cursor pointer).')
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PostToolUse', 'additionalContext': msg}}))

# General pipeline/src edit -> remind about .agents/ docs
elif re.search(r'/src/|/scripts/|/conf/', f) and not re.search(r'\\.cursor/|\\.claude/|\\.agents/', f):
    msg = (f'Pipeline file edited: {f} '
           '— check if .agents/context.md or the relevant .agents/<topic>.md needs updating.')
    print(json.dumps({'hookSpecificOutput': {'hookEventName': 'PostToolUse', 'additionalContext': msg}}))
" 2>/dev/null || true
